question: Materialize the isolated saved-intermediate owner-rank VJP win into TorchTitan e2e TFLOPs, and check whether the MORI-EP guide is applied.

code_changes.mori_aiter_moe_py: Added opt-in TORCHTITAN_MORI_AITER_FORWARD_MODE=padded_saved and TORCHTITAN_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded_saved. The forward path clones MORI dispatch outputs, builds a padded owner-rank local forward, saves gate/up/hidden/out_compact/source positions, and backward reuses that saved state instead of redispatching x/recomputing local forward.

applied: Uses EpDispatchCombineConfig/EpDispatchCombineOp with IntraNode for single-node EP4/EP8.
Uses PyTorch process-group based shmem initialization via torch._C._distributed_c10d._register_process_group('default', dist.group.WORLD) and mori.shmem.shmem_torch_process_group_init('default').
Uses get_dispatch_src_token_pos() to align backward grad dispatch order to forward dispatch order.
Uses registered combine input buffer when CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_COMBINE_INPUT_MODE=registered.
Uses MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G for target runs; the default 4G heap failed the first S128 smoke.
not_fully_applied: Retained runs use MORI_EP_LAUNCH_CONFIG_MODE=MANUAL, not AUTO/tuned configs. Current manual knobs are block_num=64, rdma_block_num=32, warp_num_per_block=8; the guide's current AUTO defaults for IntraNode are block_num=128, rdma_block_num=0, warp_per_block=16.
We have not run the guide's MI350 intra-node calibration/quick tuning matrix for EP4/EP8 and dtype/zero-copy variants.
The retained IntraNode path uses combined dispatch()/combine(), not split send/recv overlap. Split send/recv exists only in the AsyncLL diagnostic branches.
We do not use MORI's standard MoE/DeepEP adapter APIs; the TorchTitan bridge manually consumes the 2D dispatch output and prepares combine input.

validation.name: remote helper parity smoke
validation.notes: Tiny BF16 helper comparison against _compute_local_autograd_vjp completed. Max diffs were BF16-noisy: forward 0.1875, dx 0.2300, dw1 0.2347, dw3 0.0979, dw2 0.1350, dtopk 0.2899.

validation.name: 4x S128 distributed smoke
validation.shape: 4xMI350, S128, GBS4, FSDP4/EP4, full activation checkpointing
validation.notes: Two steps completed, finite loss, clean process-group teardown. First attempt without MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G failed before training due to MORI heap exhaustion.

materialized_runs.shape: 4xMI350, S4096, GBS64, MBS1, FSDP4/EP4, no activation checkpointing, expandable allocator
materialized_runs.read: Positive 4x materialization signal, but only three steps.

materialized_runs.shape: 8xMI350, S4096, GBS128, MBS1, FSDP8/EP8, no activation checkpointing, expandable allocator, CE2
materialized_runs.read: Not promotable. Saved-state VJP helps isolated local backward but this padded-training forward mode loses e2e at EP8.

materialized_runs.shape: 8xMI350, S4096, GBS128, MBS1, FSDP8/EP8, no activation checkpointing, expandable allocator, CE2, MORI timing enabled
materialized_runs.read: Timing confirms the padded-saved forward creates new forward route/sort/SwiGLU overhead and still leaves local VJP plus combine_dx as the main timed buckets.

decision: Do not promote padded_saved as the retained 8x candidate. The next materialization branch should keep the AITER/CK fused forward and expose/save training intermediates from that fused forward, or add a fused training backward that consumes AITER forward internal products, rather than replacing forward with padded owner-rank PyTorch/Triton bookkeeping.
next_actions: Run MORI guide intra-node tuning/AUTO comparison for MI350 EP4/EP8, especially IntraNode block=128 warp=16 rdma=0 versus current manual block=64 warp=8 rdma=32.
Add an AITER/CK-facing saved-intermediate export path for gate/up/hidden/out or a fused training backward, avoiding the padded forward route-pack/sort path.
Retain current best sustained 8x baseline as no-AC + expandable allocator at 64.91 TFLOPs/GPU late-step until a candidate beats it in a six-step run.
